mapper.select: select oi.*, p.image_url as imageUrl from order_items oi left join products p on oi.product_id = p.id where oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: update orders set order_status = #{orderStatus}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from orders where order_status = 0
select count(*) from orders where order_status = 1
select count(*) from orders where order_status = 2
select count(*) from orders where order_status = 3
select count(*) from orders where order_status = 4
select COALESCE(sum(total_amount), 0) from orders where order_status in (1, 2, 3)
select COALESCE(sum(total_amount), 0) from orders where order_status in (1, 2, 3) and date(create_time) = current_date
select COALESCE(sum(total_amount), 0) from orders where order_status in (1, 2, 3) and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m')
SELECT c.name, c.type, c.discount_value AS discountValue, c.min_amount AS minAmount FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.order_id = #{orderId}
